name: Salmon Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from the salmon and set aside.
2. Remove large bones and skin from the salmon.
3. Using a fork, break up the salmon into small pieces.
4. Add the remaining ingredients, using enough of the reserved salmon liquid and milk to moisten the mixture.
5. Shape the mixture into a well-greased baking dish.
6. Bake for about 30 minutes at 375°F (190°C).
7. Alternatively, one pound of ground meat may be substituted for the salmon, and baked for about 1 hour.
